ul.li: All locals must fit Mitigation Strategies

div.p: BPF program is too large. Processed 1000000 insn Stack depth 600 > 512
Solution: Move large allocations to maps

struct task_struct: ~9KB (use BPF_CORE_READ) struct sock: ~2KB (use pointers only) struct event: 328B (fits in stack) char[16] comm: 16B (fits in stack) char[256] path: 256B (needs map) u64 timestamp: 8B (fits in stack)
0x000: Return addr (8B) 0x008: Saved regs (32B) 0x028: event struct (328B) 0x148: comm[16] (16B) 0x158: [filename] REJECT 0x200: ───────────── 512B LIMIT
